props.description: Style override for the active suggestion row.

props.name: x
props.description: Caller-owned x position; no viewport clamp or flip placement is applied.

props.name: zIndex
props.description: Render and event ordering within the current plane.

props.name: rows
props.description:
TDataTable filters/sorts rows and renders the top slice through non-virtual
TTable; it does not own scrollTop or virtualization.

props.name: selectedRowKeys
props.description: Controlled selected row keys for multi-select tables.

props.name: sortBy
props.description: Sorts by the raw row value at this key; column format only affects display and filtering.

props.name: manualSort
props.description: Disables built-in sorting while keeping sort events controlled by the host.

props.name: manualFilter
props.description: Disables built-in filtering while keeping filter state host-owned.

props.name: selectable
props.description: Controls whether terminal text selection may start inside the component.

props.name: border
props.description: Draws a border around the component.

props.name: headerStyle
props.description: Style override for table header cells.

props.name: selectedStyle
props.description: Style used for selected rows or nodes.

props.name: emptyText
props.description: Text rendered when there are no rows or items.

events.description: Emitted when the sort direction changes.

props.description: Closes the dialog after a footer button confirms.

props.description: Default terminal cell style for descendants.

props.name: links
props.description:
Parses OSC8 links only with ansi=true; OSC8 links preserve parsed ANSI style and
do not inherit TLink theme defaults.

props.name: linkify
props.description:
Plain-text URL linkification for ansi=false rows; generated links inherit TLink
theme defaults before linkStyle.

props.name: linkStyle
props.description:
Link style override. OSC8 defaults to underline-only over parsed ANSI style;
linkify also inherits TLink theme defaults.

props.name: depsKey
props.description:
Optional key that participates in render-node dependency tracking.
Useful for forcing a repaint when the rendered output might change
even if `value`, `style`, and geometry are unchanged (e.g. external
terminal writes or higher-level virtualized row reuse).
